mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE pay_status = 0 AND create_time <= #{expireTime} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_status, ship_status, address_id, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{shipStatus}, #{addressId}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET pay_status = 1, pay_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND pay_status = 0
UPDATE `order` SET pay_status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND pay_status = 0
UPDATE `order` SET ship_status = #{shipStatus}, ship_time = NOW(), tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
